project_type: Next.js 16 application with React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript
build_system: bun (npm scripts via bun run). No npm/node binary directly available, use bun.
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files present)
test_command: bun run lint (note: existing lint errors in MedicationReminderAlert.tsx - react-hooks/set-state-in-effect and react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings)
verification_instructions: 1. Run `bun run build` and confirm successful compilation. 2. Run `bun run lint` and confirm no NEW errors introduced (existing warnings in the base are acceptable).
setup_instructions: Run `bun install` to install dependencies (already done). Then `bun run build` to verify baseline.
environment_constraints: No npm/node CLI available - use bun for all commands. OPEN_INTERNET network mode. bun v1.2.14 installed at /root/.local/share/mise/shims/bun.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md warns that Next.js 16 has breaking changes - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ if needed. Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and semantic HTML per steering rules.
key_patterns: Server actions in lib/actions.ts use 'use server' directive and requireSession() for auth. Client components use useTransition for action calls. MedicationReminderAlert is a client component receiving medications as props from SSR. The toggleMedication action in lib/actions.ts shows the pattern for marking medication as taken and logging to history (calls updateMedication + createMedicationLog). The db uses in-memory store with createMedicationLog(userId, medicationId, medicationName, date) to record history.
directory_structure: app/ (Next.js app router), app/components/ (client components), lib/ (server utilities, actions, db, types), app/api/ (API routes), app/history/ (history page)
